body:
Fixes #228

## Summary
- Routes command-style enumeration research prompts such as `list all X with Y` to the existing deterministic web-search path instead of `unknown`.
- Mirrors the recognizer in Rust and the browser worker, recording `web_search:query_kind:enumeration_research_request` evidence.
- Adds focused Rust and Playwright regressions for `list all genshin characters with off-field DMG`.
- Adds the requested case study, issue/PR snapshots, research notes, and verification logs under `docs/case-studies/issue-228`.

## Root Cause
The prior web-search recognizer handled explicit search commands, semantic search actions, and question-style research prompts. The reported prompt is a command-style enumeration request, so both the Rust solver and browser worker fell through to the unknown fallback.

## Reproduction
Before the fix, `cargo run -- chat --prompt "list all genshin characters with off-field DMG" --format chat` returned the local unknown fallback. After the fix, the prompt routes to `intent:web_search` with the extracted query `genshin characters with off field dmg` in Rust and the browser worker preserves `genshin characters with off-field DMG`.

## Verification
- `cargo fmt -- --check`
- `cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings`
- `rust-script scripts/check-file-size.rs`
- `cargo test`
- `cargo test --test unit web_requests::`
- `cargo test --test unit docs_requirements::`
- `npx playwright test --config=playwright.local.config.js issue-228.spec.js`

## Notes
`rust-script scripts/check-file-size.rs` passed with existing near-limit warnings only; no file-size violations were reported. This is not a visual UI change, so no before/after screenshots are included.

title: Route enumeration research prompts to web search
